allOf.title: engagementAsyncOperation

operationType.description: The type of the long-running operation. The possible values are: createCommunity, unknownFutureValue.

resourceId.description: The ID of the object created or modified as a result of this async operation.

allOf.description:
Represents the status of a Viva Engage async operation that is an operation that transcends the
lifetime of a single API request. These operations are long-running or too expensive to complete
within the time frame of their original request.
